columns.name: AAR
columns.description: Calendar year of the transaction

columns.name: AVDNR
columns.description: Unique document identifier

columns.name: PARTINR
columns.description: Participation number in the transaction

columns.name: PARTINR_KORR
columns.description: Corrected participation number if applicable

columns.name: ANLEGGNR
columns.description: Number of the installation involved in the transaction

columns.name: DATO
columns.description: Date of the transaction or event

columns.name: KUNDENR
columns.description: Unique identifier for the customer involved in the transaction

columns.name: PRODUSENTNR
columns.description: Unique identifier for the producer of the product

columns.name: BEHANDLINGSKODE
columns.description: Code indicating the type of processing or treatment

columns.name: SLAG
columns.description: Grade or quality grade of the product

columns.name: RAATT_KVANTUM
columns.description: Quantum value related to Raat (a specific measurement)

columns.name: TORT_KVANTUM
columns.description: Quantum value related to Tort (another specific measurement)

columns.name: DATO_VANN
columns.description: Date of water-related event or analysis

columns.name: INN_KODE
columns.description: Code indicating the type of incoming product or material

columns.name: FALLTALL
columns.description: Number of falls in a specific context (e.g., grain fall)

columns.name: VANNPROSENT
columns.description: Percentage content of water in the product

columns.name: TORT_STK
columns.description: Stock value related to Tort (a specific measurement)

columns.name: BASISPRIS
columns.description: Base price of the product or transaction

columns.name: TT_TORR
columns.description: Value related to Torr (a specific measurement)

columns.name: TREKK_TORK
columns.description: Torque value associated with dragging or similar operations

columns.name: HLVEKT
columns.description: Half weight of the product or transaction

columns.name: TT_HLVEKT
columns.description: Total half weight value related to the product

columns.name: PROTEIN
columns.description: Protein content of the product

columns.name: TT_PROTEIN
columns.description: Total protein content value related to the transaction

columns.name: TREKK_KVALITET
columns.description: Quality of the product during dragging or similar operations

columns.name: TERMIN_TILLEGG
columns.description: Additional information related to termination or conclusion

columns.name: BELOP
columns.description: Financial amount associated with the transaction

columns.name: KJOREDATO
columns.description: Date of driving or transportation related to the product

columns.name: GRUNN
columns.description: Reason for a specific action or event in the transaction

columns.name: TIDSPUNKT
columns.description: Timestamp of the transaction or event
